response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis—core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is heavily focused on web/mobile full-stack development, open-source tooling, and general software engineering, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering skills across multiple languages and platforms
Active open-source contributor with tangible public projects
Demonstrated ability to lead and teach via workshops and community engagement
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator hardware modeling
Lacks exposure to deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Education and experience do not meet required technical depth for principal-level hardware performance role
